en.extract:
The black-throated shrike-tanager (Lanio aurantius) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Belize, Guatemala, Honduras, and Mexico. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests.

The '''black-throated shrike-tanager''' ('''''Lanio aurantius''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Thraupidae]]. It is found in [[Belize]], [[Guatemala]], [[Honduras]], and [[Mexico]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s.
